raw_text:
EXECUTIVE SUMMARY
November 2024 actuals of $62,100 exceeded the full-report budget of $33,000 by $29,100 (+88.2%). The overage is concentrated almost entirely in Professional Fees, driven by a single $27,500 invoice from outside IP counsel (Whitmore & Associates) in connection with an active patent dispute with Vantec Corp. This invoice was CFO-approved and represents the second billing on a matter that began in August 2024. A further $8–18K of spend from the same matter is expected to fall in Q1 2025, and a budget provision for that range is recommended. The remaining variance relates to Legal & Compliance, where a $1,200 incremental spend on VP-level employment agreements is fully supported and CFO-approved.

LINE COMMENTARY

Professional Fees | +$27,500 (+183.3%) | Budget: $15,000 | Actual: $42,500
The entire variance of $27,500 is attributable to a single CFO-approved invoice from Whitmore & Associates (Matter WA-2024-IP-441) for IP dispute advisory work performed October–November 2024 in preparation for USPTO proceedings. Whitmore was engaged in August 2024 to defend against a patent infringement claim filed by Vantec Corp.; a first billing of approximately $12K was absorbed within budget in September/October, making November's invoice the second and larger of the expected billings. The General Counsel's background note indicates total matter cost is estimated at $45–55K over six months, of which approximately $39.5K has been billed to date; a further $8–18K is likely to fall in Q1 2025 when USPTO proceedings commence, and forward budgeting for that range is recommended.
Sources
- Gmail - 2024-11-17T18:15:00Z - gmail-professional_fees-broad - Invoice from Whitmore & Associates — IP dispute advisory, Matter WA-2024-IP-441. Work performed October–November in preparation for USPTO proceedings. Fee: $27,500. CFO approved 10 November.
- Slack - 2024-11-17T12:15:00Z - slack-professional_fees-broad - Whitmore invoice hit today, $27.5K for IP defence work. This is the large one we've been expecting. CFO approved, posted to Professional Fees. Total matter spend so far: $39.5K of ~$50K estimate.
- Gmail - 2024-11-17T18:45:00Z - gmail-professional_fees-narrow - Context from GC — Whitmore engaged in August to defend against patent claim from Vantec Corp. Expected total matter cost $45–55K over 6 months. November invoice is second billing; first $12K was absorbed within budget in September/October. Remaining $8–18K expected in Q1 2025.
- Slack - 2024-11-17T12:45:00Z - slack-professional_fees-narrow - IP dispute context: Vantec filed patent infringement claim in September. Our outside counsel (Whitmore) assesses strong defence. USPTO proceedings begin Q1 2025. Remaining costs will be in Q1.

Legal & Compliance | +$1,200 (+24.0%) | Budget: $5,000 | Actual: $6,200
The $1,200 overage reflects a flat-fee invoice from Heron Legal for the drafting of employment agreements for two incoming VP hires (VP Engineering and VP Sales) under a board-approved engagement. The spend is CFO-approved and consistent with the company's standard onboarding process for executive hires. No further Legal & Compliance exposure related to these engagements is indicated by the evidence.
Sources
- Gmail - 2024-11-18T18:15:00Z - gmail-legal_&_compliance-broad - Invoice from Heron Legal — employment agreements for two new VP hires (VP Engineering and VP Sales). $1,200 flat fee per board-approved engagement. CFO approved.
- Slack - 2024-11-18T12:15:00Z - slack-legal_&_compliance-broad - VP Engineering and VP Sales offers accepted. Employment agreements went to Heron Legal for review this month — standard process. $1,200 total.

INSIGNIFICANT VARIANCES
The following lines each show variances below the significance threshold and required no further investigation.
- Audit & Accounting: +$200 (+2.5%) — immaterial, no review required.
- Software Subscriptions: +$100 (+3.3%) — immaterial, no review required.
- Office & Admin: +$100 (+5.0%) — immaterial, no review required.
